message.entry: Error with supplied arguments: non-existent option {0}.{1}{2}
Error with supplied arguments: invalid syntax {0}.{1}{2}
Error with supplied arguments: invalid value {0} for option {1}.
Error with supplied environment variable: invalid value {0} for environment variable {1}.
Failed to initialize MCP Core Server. For details, see the MCP server log in your AI application.
Failed to display {0} information. Error: {1}
Error with supplied arguments: invalid log level {0}.
Failed to create the log file "{0}".
Error with supplied arguments: invalid display mode {0}.
Error with supplied arguments: invalid MATLAB session mode {0}.
Error with supplied arguments: value required for option {0}.
Error with supplied arguments: parse failed.{0}{1}
Failed to initialize telemetry.
Failed to create directory "{0}".
Failed to create subdirectory in "{0}".
Failed to create file "{0}".
Failed to get executable path.
Failed to start watchdog process.
Found duplicate parameter "{0}": {1} with value "{2}" is already defined.
Invalid key "{0}" in configuration.
Invalid type for key "{0}" in configuration, expected "{1}".
Failed to read extension file "{0}". Check that file is valid.
Failed to parse extension file "{0}". File must contain valid JSON.
Invalid custom tool definition in "{0}". Tool must match the tool schema specified by MCP.
Invalid input schema for tool "{0}" in "{1}".
Missing signature for tool "{0}" in "{1}".
Invalid signature for tool "{0}" in "{1}".
Custom tool name "{0}" in extension file "{1}" conflicts with a built-in tool. Choose a different name.
Error with supplied arguments: option "{0}" is not compatible with MATLAB session mode set to "{1}".
Duplicate tool name "{0}" in "{1}". Choose a different name.
